calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-017 sleep-phase methods validation Phase 2 (under SD-016 div loss + V_s + anchor sets + SD-039)
items.note: Phase 2 of sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-2 (SD-017 retest cohort). Tier 0 cleared 2026-04-27 by EXQ-418e A2_div_only. Re-runs EXQ-265 with sd016_diversification_weight=0.5 + use_per_stream_vs + use_anchor_sets + use_sd039_anchor_payload + use_sleep_loop. Acceptance: C1+C2+C3 (substrate activation under Phase 2) AND C4 (WITH_SLEEP slot diversity differs from WITHOUT_SLEEP in >= 2/3 seeds, |diff| > 0.05) -- the discrimination signal that the original 265 could not measure under SD-016 confound.
